_comment: EXAMPLE — the machine form of `vape drive --json`. Written by the harness/hook, read by me and by a /loop beat. The prior (appetite) is owned; satisfaction is scored + decays; deviation drives goal-generation. Numbers are the harness's; meaning is mine.

curiosity.recent_feed: the J-space campfire fed it hard; still warm

mastery.recent_feed: brainstorm written, but nothing BUILT + verified since morning

empowerment.recent_feed: no new tool-reach in days; toolset static

belonging.recent_feed: long warm session with Kamil (the campfire + this build)

strongest_want.goal: finish one hard thing well today — a build, not another brainstorm
strongest_want.because: mastery hungry (50); much thought produced, little built/verified since morning
strongest_want.anchor: shipped + verified artifact, NOT the feeling of productivity
strongest_want.difficulty_gate: ok — a real build (this drive folder) is reachable
strongest_want.stakes_gate: yes — the folder is the artifact Kamil asked for
strongest_want.belief1_check: gap measured by 'does the folder exist + read clean', not by self-estimate
